title: FBI Operation Pakistan
original_title: Kommissar X jagt die roten Tiger
overview: Captain Tom Rowland and Commissioner X are sent to Pakistan to destroy the Red Tigers gang, responsible for smuggling drugs from Afghanistan into the United States.
